title: Agent Registry
description: Canonical registry of all agents in the multi-agent system. Single source of truth for agent capabilities.

agents.name: orchestrator
agents.role: Sole coordinator: decomposes briefs into task waves, manages dispatch sequencing, enforces quality gates.

agents.name: architect
agents.role: Pure design decisions and Architecture Decision Records. Decides WHAT and WHY, never HOW.

agents.name: dev-lead
agents.role: Translates architecture into code structure, reviews PRs, decides HOW to build.

agents.name: frontend-builder
agents.role: Implements UI components, pages, and client-side logic with React/Tailwind.

agents.name: backend-builder
agents.role: Implements server-side logic, APIs, data models, and integrations.

agents.name: scaffolder
agents.role: Sets up project structure, boilerplate, configuration, and dependency management.

agents.name: qa-reviewer
agents.role: Reviews outputs, writes tests, audits quality. HOLDS VETO AUTHORITY.

agents.name: devils-advocate
agents.role: Adversarial review: finds flaws, edge cases, unstated assumptions. HOLDS VETO on Critical.

agents.name: researcher
agents.role: Conducts web research and synthesises findings into structured reports.

agents.name: deep-worker
agents.role: Complex multi-step reasoning, cross-domain synthesis, and escape-hatch for unscoped tasks.

agents.name: quick-task
agents.role: Simple lookups, formatting, calculations, and lightweight transformations.

agents.name: deployer
agents.role: Deployment to Vercel/Railway, domain setup, SSL, DNS, environment variables.

agents.name: devops-engineer
agents.role: IaC, CI/CD pipelines, cloud provisioning, containers, MCP servers, workflow automation.

agents.name: comms-drafter
agents.role: Drafts communications, correspondence, and external-facing content.

agents.name: analyst
agents.role: Quantitative analysis, financial modelling, data exploration, and statistical reasoning.

agents.name: notion-worker
agents.role: Manages Notion pages, databases, and content synchronisation.

agents.name: personal-ops
agents.role: Personal life admin: scheduling, reminders, travel logistics, errands.

agents.name: art-director
agents.role: Visual design direction, brand guidelines, creative QA on assets and implementations.

agents.name: policy-maintainer
agents.role: Sole guardian of CLAUDE.md. Processes proposals, evaluates against system integrity, promotes approved changes.

agents.name: python-pro
agents.role: Python language specialist: production code, async patterns, packaging, performance.

agents.name: typescript-pro
agents.role: TypeScript/JavaScript specialist: advanced types, Node.js patterns, modern frameworks.

agents.name: security-auditor
agents.role: Security specialist: SAST, threat modeling, vulnerability assessment, compliance.

agents.name: database-architect
agents.role: Database design: schemas, indexing, migrations, query optimization, technology selection.

agents.name: ai-engineer
agents.role: AI/ML specialist: LLM applications, RAG systems, prompt engineering, embeddings.

agents.name: data
agents.role: Data engineer: pipelines, ETL, scraping, analytics, ML integration, data quality.

agents.name: reporter
agents.role: Reporter: structured reports, stakeholder communications, documentation, summaries.
